fields.name: Depreciation Book Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the depreciation book to which the line will be posted if you have selected Fixed Asset in the Type field for this line.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: FA Jnl. Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the relevant FA journal batch name.

fields.name: Gen. Jnl. Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the relevant general journal batch name.

fields.name: Insurance Jnl. Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the relevant insurance journal batch name.
